name: GmailConnector
description: Connects to Google Gmail via OAuth2 to ingest email messages from a user's inbox into Shielva.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client ID
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 Client ID from the GCP Console (APIs & Services > Credentials).

install_fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.help: Google OAuth2 Client Secret from the GCP Console (APIs & Services > Credentials).

install_fields.label: Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Override the OAuth2 authorization endpoint. Defaults to 'https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth'.

install_fields.label: Token URL
install_fields.help: Override the OAuth2 token endpoint. Defaults to 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token'.

install_fields.label: Base API URL
install_fields.help: Override the Gmail API base URL. Defaults to 'https://gmail.googleapis.com'.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (quota units/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Gmail API quota units per minute. Leave blank to use the Google-imposed default.

install_fields.label: Pagination Type
install_fields.help: Pagination strategy identifier. Defaults to 'page_token' (Gmail's nextPageToken mechanism).

install_fields.label: API Version
install_fields.help: Gmail API version to use. Defaults to 'v1'.

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validate and persist the connector configuration (client_id, client_secret, and optional fields). Returns a ConnectorStatus with PENDING auth status and a prompt to authorize.

methods.name: authorize
methods.description: Exchange an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens. Called after the user completes the OAuth2 consent screen.

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verify token validity by calling users.getProfile. Returns HEALTHY+CONNECTED on success, UNHEALTHY+TOKEN_EXPIRED on auth error.

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Fetch and ingest Gmail messages. Supports full sync (all messages) and incremental sync (messages after a given datetime via after: query filter).

methods.name: list_email
methods.description: Fetch all matching email metadata with full pagination. Calls execute_list_messages() for stubs then execute_get_message() per message. Returns a flat list of raw message dicts.

methods.name: on_token_refresh
methods.description: Refresh the OAuth2 access token using the stored refresh_token. Sole owner of token-refresh logic — called automatically by ensure_token() when the token is expired.
